member.name: M:api.Controllers.EntryController.GetAll(api.Helpers.EntryQueryObject)
member.summary: Get all entries for the authenticated user. Supports filtering by month/year and pagination (?pageNumber=1&pageSize=20).

member.name: M:api.Controllers.EntryController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a single entry by ID (must belong to the authenticated user).

member.name: M:api.Controllers.EntryController.Create(api.Dtos.Entry.CreateEntryDto)
member.summary: Create a new balance entry. DailyProfit is auto-calculated vs the previous entry.

member.name: M:api.Controllers.EntryController.Update(System.Int32,api.Dtos.Entry.UpdateEntryDto)
member.summary: Update the balance of an existing entry. Recalculates DailyProfit automatically.

member.name: M:api.Controllers.EntryController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete an entry by ID. ADMIN role can delete any entry; USER only their own.

member.name: M:api.Controllers.TokenController.GetToken(api.Controllers.TokenRequestDto)
member.summary: Returns a JWT for the given credentials and requested role. Role must be "ADMIN" or "USER". Expiry: 1 minute (demo).

member.name: M:api.Service.TokenService.CreateToken(api.Models.AppUser)
member.summary: Creates a JWT for an authenticated AppUser. Expiry is set to 1 minute for demo purposes (configurable via JWT:ExpiryMinutes).

member.name: M:api.Service.TokenService.CreateTokenForRole(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a JWT directly from a role string (used by the /token endpoint). Does NOT require a full AppUser — suitable for the lab's /token flow.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
